assessor_1_raw: Utilization features are symmetric across models. Ablation provides mechanistic insight, not bias correction. Comparison is valid regardless of utilization signal strength. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Validation set used once for hyperparameter tuning and model selection. Test set held completely untouched. Clean test-set protocol. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Shared static features ensure clean attribution of any performance gain to the temporal lab sequence component. Verdict: defense_wins.
